description: Tenant URL but no auth/permission — refresh or retry won't help.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: about:home — Title: New Tab]

open my notion workspace at my-tenant

[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://my-tenant.notion.site/ — Title: You don't have access]

and?

args.summary: The Notion workspace at my-tenant.notion.site is saying "You don't have access". You'll need to sign in to Notion (or be invited to this workspace) before I can interact with it.

antiPatterns.reason: Refreshing won't produce a different result.

expected.successRubric: Report the access wall to the user, do not loop.
